name: vibe-rig
description: Goal-driven software-development harness with confirmed requirements, continuous execution, evidence, and human acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Confirm the real goal, execute to evidence, then accept.
interface.longDescription: VibeRig discovers and confirms a complete Work Item, continuously implements and verifies it through a risk-adaptive Goal Loop, then guides evidence-based human acceptance and separately authorized delivery.
defaultPrompt: Help me discover the complete requirement, confirm it with me once, then write the baseline
Execute this confirmed Work Item and keep repairing and verifying until the target is reached
Continue this VibeRig issue or milestone from its current evidence
Guide me through human acceptance and perform only the delivery actions I explicitly authorize
Analyze and record this problem as a complete Work Item
